# tests/fixtures

Seeded adventures, transcripts, and combat scripts (per `DEVELOPMENT-PLAN.md` SS1.3) used by
integration tests and by the `SEED_DEMO=true` demo-content script (a demo adventure + 2 demo
characters + fixture content, required to work from Phase 2 onward per `DEVELOPMENT-PLAN.md`
SS1.3, so the user can test without burning API credits).

Empty until Phase 2 (F2 Character Page & Creator) starts.
